name: 1-2-3-4 Cake with Caramel Icing
recipeInstructions:
Icing:
1/2 cup butter (1 stick)
1 cup dark brown sugar -- firmly packed
1/4 cup milk
2 cups powdered sugar -- well sifted
Preheat oven to 350°. In a large mixing bowl, cream the butter and sugar together with an electric mixer until smooth, then add the eggs and continue beating until smooth. In a separate bowl, mix the flour and baking powder together, then add alternately with the milk to the butter mixture, beating steadily until smooth. Add the vanilla and beat until well blended. Grease and flour three 9-inch cake pans, divide the batter evenly among the pans, and tap the bottom of each pan to distribute the batter evenly. Bake for 25 to 30 minutes, or until a straw inserted in the centers comes out clean. Let cool completely.
Meanwhile, to make the icing: melt the butter over low heat in a saucepan, add the brown sugar and milk, bring to a boil, then remove from the heat and let cool. Add the powdered sugar and mix until well blended. When the cake layers are cooled, remove from the pans and place one layer on a serving plate. Spread one third of the icing over the layer. Place a second layer over the icing and spread with more icing. Top with the third layer and spread icing over the top and around the sides.
